// Wynnies
// 13-03-26
// Based on Luxury of the Cease-Fire by Salted, found here:
//   https://musescore.com/user/35228398/scores/11780221


// Flute in A major / F# minor (C#, F#, G#)
let flute1 = `<
[- - [- b4] [c#5 d5]]
>`.gain(range(1, 1.25))

let flute2 = arrange([2, `<
[e5 - [- f#5] [e5 d5]]
[b4 - [- b4] [c#5 d5]]
>`],
[1, `<
[c#5 b4 a#4 c#5]
>`.decay(1)],
[1, `<<
[b4 - [- b4] [c#5 d5]]
[b4@2 - -]
>>`],
).gain(1.25)


// Sax in B major / G# minor (A#, C#, D#, F#, G#)
let sax1 = `<
[[b2 d#3] f#3 - -]
[[f#3 a#3] c#4 - -]
[[g#3 b#3] d#4 - -]
[[c#4 e4] g#4 - -]
>`


// Horn in C major ()
let horn1 = `<->`


// Trumpet in B flat major / G minor (Bb, Eb)
let trumpet1 = `<->`


// Bass drum
let bd1 = `<
[- - bd@2]
>`.gain(1.75)

let bd2 = `<
[bd -@0.5 [bd@0.25]*3 -@0.75 -]
>`.gain(0.75)


// Tracks
setcpm(75/2)
$: stack(arrange( // Flute
  [3, silence],
  [1, flute1],
  [8, flute2],
  [0, silence],
).note().sound("gm_flute").release(0.25)._punchcard(), arrange( // Sax
  [0, silence],
  [4, sax1],
  [8, silence],
).note().sound("gm_soprano_sax").release(0.25)._punchcard(), arrange( // Horn
  [12, silence],
).note().sound("gm_french_horn")._punchcard(), arrange( // Trumpet
  [12, silence],
).note().sound("gm_trumpet")._punchcard(), arrange( // Bass Drum
  [3, silence],
  [1, bd1],
  [8, bd2],
  [0, silence],
).sound().bank("RolandTR808").room(0.8).size(1)._punchcard(), arrange( // Snare Drum
  [12, silence],
).bank("RolandTR808").room(0.8).size(1)._punchcard(), arrange( // Piano
  [12, silence],
).note().sound("gm_piano")._punchcard(),)

// Wynnies
// 25-03-26
// Based on Luxury of the Cease-Fire by Salted, found here:
//   https://musescore.com/user/35228398/scores/11780221


// Samples
samples('github:Wynnies/Strudel-Samples')


// Flute in A major / F# minor (C#, F#, G#)
let flute1 = `<
[- - [- b4] [c#5 d5]]
>`.gain(range(1, 1.25))

let flute2 = arrange([2, `<
[e5 - [- f#5] [e5 d5]]
[b4 - [- b4] [c#5 d5]]
>`],
[1, `<
[c#5 b4 a#4 c#5]
>`.decay(1)],
[1, `<<
[b4 - [- b4] [c#5 d5]]
[b4@2 - -]
>>`],
).gain(1.25)


// Sax in B major / G# minor (A#, C#, D#, F#, G#)
let sax1 = `<
[[b3 d#4] f#4 - -]
[[f#4 a#4] c#5 - -]
[[g#4 b#4] d#5 - -]
[[c#5 e5] g#5 - -]
>`


// Horn in C major ()
let horn1 = arrange([1, `<
[c3 b2 a#2 c3]
>`.attack(0.4).decay(0.1)],[1, `<
[b2 - - -]
>`.decay(1)])


// Trumpet in B flat major / G minor (Bb, Eb)
let trumpet1 = `<->`


// Bass drum
let bd1 = `<
[- - bd@2]
>`.gain(1.75)

let bd2 = `<
[bd -@0.5 [bd@0.25]*3 -@0.75 -]
>`.gain(0.75)


// Snare drum
let sd1 = `<->`


// Piano in A major / F# minor (C#, F#, G#)
let piano1 = `<
[[a2 c#3] e3 - -]
[[e3 g#3] b3 - -]
[[f#3 a#3] c#4 - -]
[[b3 d4] f#4 - -]
>`.gain(0.75)

let piano2 = stack(`<
[[a3 c#4]*4]
[[g#3 b3]*4]
[[f#3 a#3]*4]
[[b3 d4]*4]
>`,`<
[a2@2 c#3@2]
[g#2@2 b2@2]
[f#2@2 c#3@2]
<[b2@2 f#3@2]
[b2@2]*2
>>`).gain(0.75)


// Tracks
setcpm(75/2)
$: stack(arrange( // Flute
  [3, silence],
  [1, flute1],
  [8, flute2],
  [0, silence],
).note().sound("gm_flute").release(0.25).color("cyan")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Sax
  [0, silence],
  [4, sax1],
  [8, silence],
).note().sound("gm_soprano_sax").release(0.25).color("lime")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Horn
  [6, silence],
  [2, horn1],
  [4, silence],
).note().sound("horn").color("red")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Trumpet
  [12, silence],
).note().sound("gm_trumpet").color("yellow")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Bass Drum
  [3, silence],
  [1, bd1],
  [8, bd2],
  [0, silence],
).sound().bank("RolandTR808").color("orange")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Snare Drum
  [12, silence],
).bank("RolandTR808").color("blue")._pianoroll(), arrange( // Piano
  [4, silence],
  [8, piano2],
  [0, silence],
).note().sound("gm_piano").color("magenta")._pianoroll(),).room(0.8).size(1).punchcard()


// Testing
_$: arrange( // Horn
  [2, horn1],
  [4, silence],
).note().sound("horn").room(0.8).size(1)._punchcard()
